column8: We'd had dinner when Wendy arrived.
column9: I read the book after I've seen the film.
column10: By the time Dad came home, I'd gone to bed.
column11: She didn't go to bed until her mum had come home.
column12: Mr Banks hadn't arrived at the office by the time I got there.
column13: They'd bought the plane tickets before they heard about the cheaper flight.
column14: The girls had tidied the house when the visitors arrived.
